text:
Author: scheidell
Date: Tue Aug  7 13:54:02 2012
New Revision: 302238
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302238

Log:
  - Submitter is now maintainer

  Approved by:	Fernan Aguero <fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar> (maintainer)

Modified:

Modified: head/biology/mafft/Makefile

--- head/biology/mafft/Makefile	Tue Aug  7 12:31:04 2012	(r302237)
+++ head/biology/mafft/Makefile	Tue Aug  7 13:54:02 2012	(r302238)
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://mafft.cbrc.jp/align
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-without-extensions-src
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
-MAINTAINER=	fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
+MAINTAINER=	cartwright@asu.edu
 COMMENT=	Multiple alignment program for amino acid or nucleotide sequences
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
